---
title: "fix_muninn.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/scripts/fix_muninn.py"
loc: 20
complexity: 7
logic_score: 3.60
style_score: 3.88
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 6.64
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating standardize_muninn.

## Interaction Protocol
Import standardize_muninn and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 10 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [re](file://re)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)

### Exports
- `standardize_muninn`
